channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] My favourite Band Maid album, I should clarify.
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
My favourite Band Maid album, I should clarify.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] two people and that’s why it gave an unusual impression for a BAND-MAID song,...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
two people and that’s why it gave an unusual impression for a BAND-MAID song, I think.

Saiki: The song was the first recorded, but it was fun because I was singing in line with my image in the band. I wonder if they made it closer to that world view when they arranged it. Many BAND-MAID songs in t

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] — Of BAND-MAID 's songs are based on hard rock and Rock & Roll there are many...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— Of BAND-MAID 's songs are based on hard rock and Rock & Roll there are many upbeat numbers, but this song is a mid-tempo tune with intensity.

Misa: We wanted to increase the number of songs not typical of BAND-MAID, but this is especially true of "Awkward".

Miku: It is Misa’s favourite song, isn

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

1st Live:5/9/2017

item.title: [BlueSky] ⛩️The Singularity Is Nigh, aber vorher kommt BAND-MAID mit ENERGETIC
item.dc:creator: SvenTetzlaff （翁 辞文） (sventetzlaff.literatur.social.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
⛩️The Singularity Is Nigh, aber vorher kommt BAND-MAID mit ENERGETIC

LALALA LALALA LALALA ... 🤪

BAND-MAID hatte gerade eine Tour in Europe:
BERLIN, COLUMBIA THEATER
FRANKFURT, BATSCHKAPP
MUNICH, TECHNIKUM
PARIS, BATACLAN
LONDON, ELECTRIC BRIXTON
Alle Konzerte waren restlos ausverkauft. 😎 […]

BlueSky · sventetzlaff.literatur.social.ap.brid.gy

item.title: [BlueSky] Akane from Band-Maid drumming like a champ on their new single.

item.description:
Akane from Band-Maid drumming like a champ on their new single.

item.title: [BlueSky] My copy of the new Band-Maid single, Energetic, arrived last week but I could...
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
My copy of the new Band-Maid single, Energetic, arrived last week but I couldn't enjoy it due to my knackered back.

I feel like today is the day to open it up and put it on repeat for a while.

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Hey Band-Maid
item.dc:creator: Chi Nerd (mimikute.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hey Band-Maid
There is a real family behind these words, not just another post on your screen. Their story deserves to be seen. If you have a moment, please visit my page and read the pinned post. 🙏

BlueSky · mimikute.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] AFAIK, Band Maid's only cover. I LOVE this track. The (killer) main riff and ...
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
AFAIK, Band Maid's only cover. I LOVE this track. The (killer) main riff and general melody are faithful, but Akane adds a lot to the drums and Kanami's solo is original.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] MUCC -縁 [en]-" album (Disc 1 - Track #2) released on 11/22/2017. Included as ...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
MUCC -縁 [en]-" album (Disc 1 - Track #2) released on 11/22/2017. Included as a bonus track on the WORLD DOMINATION album. Played live once on 12/20/2017 at Rensa in Sendai when Band-Maid, Roach, and Hysteric Panic opened for MUCC. MUCC also later played the song and Saiki joined them on stage. (The

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 色彩論って色同士の調和を考えるという意味で音楽論にも通じるんですけど、そういう意味で最近のBAND-MAIDはすげぇなって思ってます。ぶつかりあう面白さ。
item.dc:creator: かろ（B面） (karo229b.bsky.social)
item.description:
色彩論って色同士の調和を考えるという意味で音楽論にも通じるんですけど、そういう意味で最近のBAND-MAIDはすげぇなって思ってます。ぶつかりあう面白さ。

BAND-MAID - ENERGETIC
youtu.be/NpZjslVGhbE?...

BlueSky · karo229b.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 🌟 気になるニューストピックス 🌟
item.dc:creator: にゅーす! (news0.bsky.social)
item.description:
🌟 気になるニューストピックス 🌟
北海道標津町では、30キロオーバーの速度超過で中国籍の36歳男が逮捕されました 🚨😱。また、青森県内では、地震の影響で10人がけがをし、住宅の一部損壊が5棟、建物の被害は362棟に上りました 🌪️😨。
🌸 ニュース以外のトピックス 🌸
エンターテイメント関連では、BAND-MAIDのワールドツアー2026の情報が公開されました 🎸🎶。また、カリー子さんとぽむ隊長の対決が話題になっています 🤩👀。
#ニュース #サッカー #W杯 #地震 #クマ #速度超過 #BANDMAID #カリー子 #ぽむ隊長

BlueSky · news0.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Yo！What's up Bro！ハロー人類！お仕事リハビリ中のジョニーちゃんだぜ！最近BAND-MAIDに激ハマりしてモチベ限界突破中のオレちゃんが作っ...
item.dc:creator: GROUND ZERO (groundzerojb0906.bsky.social)
item.description:
Yo！What's up Bro！ハロー人類！お仕事リハビリ中のジョニーちゃんだぜ！最近BAND-MAIDに激ハマりしてモチベ限界突破中のオレちゃんが作った最新ショート動画が今ドロップされたぜ！魂の手書き字幕、今すぐチェックしなよ！素晴らしい一日にしちゃおうぜ！
👇動画
youtube.com/shorts/G5_wK...

BlueSky · groundzerojb0906.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] วงดนตรีญี่ปุ่นนี่จิ้มวงไหนก็เจอแต่ไลน์เบสเทพ ซึ่งเล่นคนละสไตล์กับตะวันตกเลย

item.description:

เพลงใหม่ BAND-MAID นี่เบสโคตรเด่น เท่ด้วย อิพวกตะวันตกหูไม่ถึง

item.description:
【掲載アーティスト 1/4】

Deja Vu Slider / HOME
Oasis / bane, lo-key design
in the room / Arche
砂漠 / utari
SNEAKPEAK feat. Shing02 / jizue, Shing02
SIREN / Vuat
乱気 / れん
SOS / tuki.
stella / Lil' Leise But Gold, KM
ENERGETIC / BAND-MAID
銀夜灯 / 折原伊桜

item.title: [BlueSky] あたしが以前から推してるバンドの新曲

item.description:
あたしが以前から推してるバンドの新曲
マジでベースがカッコええわあ！

item.title: [BlueSky] Wishing you the happiest of birthdays! I hope this year sees many more good t...
item.dc:creator: El is in the Details (elsbells.bsky.social)
item.description:
Wishing you the happiest of birthdays! I hope this year sees many more good things come to you. 😊

And I was not previously familiar with Band-Maid, but they go so hard! That was a really fun video, and I appreciate you introducing me to them.

BlueSky · elsbells.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Happy womb emancipation day, Doc!
item.dc:creator: The Antarian Ambassador (antarian-embassy.bsky.social)
item.description:
Happy womb emancipation day, Doc!

I had heard of Band-Maid, but never listened to anything by them; didn't know they were metal. I'll have to check them out some more.

BlueSky · antarian-embassy.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Re-listening to this album and goddamn, does anyone know where I can get a re...
item.dc:creator: Derek Smith (darathus.xyz)
item.description:
Re-listening to this album and goddamn, does anyone know where I can get a replacement face? This one was melted from the opening riff.

BAND-MAID - Ready to Rock
www.youtube.com/watch?v=eapN...

BlueSky · darathus.xyz

item.title: [BlueSky] It's been a good while since I talked about them, especially here, but it's a...
item.dc:creator: Shelbie 🐺⚔️ (theshiz147.bsky.social)
item.description:
It's been a good while since I talked about them, especially here, but it's always good when we get new BAND-MAID music. And I always love how so many of their songs have such powerful and positive lyrics. Definitely need that kind of music right now.
www.youtube.com/watch?v=NpZj...

BlueSky · theshiz147.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] New Music Alert! 🇯🇵 BAND-MAID New Single “ENERGETIC”
item.dc:creator: Tokyo Noizu - Japanese Rock & Metal Music (tokyonoizu.bsky.social)
item.description:
New Music Alert! 🇯🇵 BAND-MAID New Single “ENERGETIC”

The internationally acclaimed rock outfit have announced the release of their new single, ENERGETIC, arriving on 24 June alongside an official music video.

Read more: tokyonoizu.com

#japan #metalheads #bandmaid

BlueSky · tokyonoizu.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Brand new Band Maid
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
Brand new Band Maid
LOVE the performance part of this vid, they just look so joyous. Wait for this to get an extended live bass intro. Great showcase for Misa, love Kanamii's solo too. I still find the recent compositions a bit messy, but this is the best for a while.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social
